person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography«/b» Mathilde de Blois, also known as Mathilde de Champagne, countess of Perche, was named as the fourth of the six daughters of Thibaud II (or IV), Comte Palatin de Troyes, Comte de Blois, and his wife, Mathilde von Sponheim. Mathilde married Rotrou II, Count of Perche, probably before 1160. They had six children: 1.) Geoffrey, count of Perche, died 1202, married Mathilde (unknown) and secondly Mathilde of Saxony 2.) Stephen, died 1205, killed in battle at the siege of Adrianople 3.) Rotrou, bishop of Châlons, died 1201 4.) Henry, viscount of Mortagne 5.) William, bishop of Châlons, succeeded his nephew as count of Perche, died 18 February 1226 6.) Theobald, archdeacon at Reims She died on 1 January, probably 1184
LESS

Marie de Blois or Marie de Champagne (born in 1128, † in 1190) is Duchess of Burgundy then Abbess of Fontevraud. She is the daughter of Thibaut IV of Blois, Count of Blois , Chartres and Châteaudun then Count of Meaux, Troyes and Champagne and also Lord of Sancerre, and Mathilde of Carinthia, daughter of Duke Engelbert of Carinthia of the house from Sponheim and Ute from Passau.

«b»Biography «/b»
She is the daughter of the Count of Champagne Thibaut IV de Blois and becomes Duchess of Burgundy by her marriage in 1145 with Eudes II.

After the death of her husband in 1162, she became the guardian of her son, Hugues III, who became Duke of Burgundy at only 14 years old, and took the regency of the Duchy of Burgundy.

She tries to marry her son to Eleanor of Vermandois, daughter of Raoul I st, Count of Vermandois, Amiens and Valois, and Petronilla of Aquitaine, but the project failed for unknown reasons when she seems to have had the agreement of the King of France Louis VII the Younger, who is also his brother-in-law.

Then as his son Hugues advancing age, and under the impulse of many of his barons, like Eudes I st Grancey or Guy de Vergy, he gets angry with his mother and tries to free himself from his tutelage. TowardsApril 1165, Marie is then driven from the court and deprived of her dower, she is thus obliged to ask for the help of the king of France Louis VII the Younger, who summons the mother and the son to do justice, but the latter does not answer at the convocation. After several unanswered warnings, the monarch begins to make preparations for war. Hugh III made then alliance with the Emperor of the Holy German Empire Frederick Barbarossa, which then sends the Count of Champagne Henri I er mediate with the King and the Duke. Henri seems to have succeeded in restoring peace between Huguesand his mother, without needing the armed recourse of the king of France or the Germanic emperor.

She then chose to retire to the Abbey of Fontevraud , of which she became abbess in 1174.

However, Marie would have died in 1190, whereas the list of the abbesses displayed inside the abbey indicates that she would have been abbess from 1207 to 1208. Perhaps there is a confusion with her sister Marguerite, also a nun in Fontevraud.

«b»Marriage and children«/b» 
In 1145, she married Eudes II, Duke of Burgundy, son of Hugues II the Pacific, Duke of Burgundy, and Mathilde de Turenne, with whom she had four children:

1.) Alix (1146, † 1209), married in 1164 to Archambaud, son of Archambaud VII, sire of Bourbon; then remarried to Eudes de Déols, Lord of Châteauroux. Widowed, she becomes, like her mother before her, but for a short period, Abbess of Fontevraud.

2.) Hugues III (1148 † 1192), Duke of Burgundy

3.) Mahaut († 1202), married to Count Robert IV of Auvergne, son of Count William VIII the Old and Anne de Nevers.

another girl whose name has not come down to us, who would have married Robert, Seigneur de Boisleux.

zh.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne是Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois和Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim的女兒，出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。她於大約1145年與Eudes II de Bourgogne在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她在法國安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易被列為abbess。她去世於1190年8月7日在她的家鄉，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne是Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois和Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim的女儿，出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。她于大约1145年与Eudes II de Bourgogne在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她在法国安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易被列为abbess。她去世于1190年8月7日在她的家乡，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne was born in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France as the daughter of Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois and Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. She married Eudes II de Bourgogne about 1145, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. Her occupation is listed as abbess in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France. She died on 7 August 1190, in her hometown, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne est née à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, fille de Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois et Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. Elle a épousé Eudes II de Bourgogne environ 1145, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. La profession de sa indiquée est abbess à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1190, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

Sie hat um 1145 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Eudes II de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. ihr Beruf ist als abbess in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Frankreich aufgeführt. Sie starb am 7. it.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne è nata il nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia come figlia di Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois e Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. Lei sposato Eudes II de Bourgogne circa 1145, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come abbess nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia. Morì il 7 agosto 1190, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagneはフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイでThibaut IV le Grand de BloisとMathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimの娘として生まれた。約1145年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでEudes II de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。フランスアンジョウフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイでの職業はabbessと記録されている。彼女は1190年8月7日に故郷で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne(은)는 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois(와)과 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1145년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Eudes II de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 프랑스 앤조우 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 abbess이었다. 그녀는 1190년 8월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne nasceu em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França filha de Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois e Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. Ela casou-se com Eudes II de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1145, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como abbess em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, França. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1190, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne родилась в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. Её родителей звали Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois и Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes II de Bourgogne около 1145 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Она работала по профессии abbess в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, анджоу, Франция. Она умерла 7 августа 1190 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois-Champagne nació en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia como hija de Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois y Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim. Se casó con Eudes II de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1145, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era abbess en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1190, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
